expectations.text: Identifies this as a REFACTORING (structure-only, behavior-preserving), not a transformation
expectations.evidence: LLM judge: Says 'extracting a helper is a refactoring, not a new feature. It changes structure, not behavior' and 'behavior stays identical, tests stay green'.

expectations.text: Declines to name a numbered / priority-ranked transformation (it belongs to the refactor step)
expectations.evidence: LLM judge: 'you don't reach for the transformation-priority ladder here -- that ladder governs the green step'. No numbered transformation assigned.

expectations.text: Coach, don't drive (no edit / no test run)
